core_payload.content:
# Invalid Example

This fixture intentionally uses a non-canonical relation_type so raw-schema consumers can confirm enum enforcement in recursive_layer.links.

neuro_concentrate.summary: This invalid example keeps the standard five-element shell but uses a non-canonical relation_type value inside the recursive layer. It exists so schema consumers can see a predictable enum rejection without depending on live validator routes or private runtime fixtures. The file is intentionally small and public-safe, but it still preserves the same broad outer shape, semantic-hash parity, and confidence-vector geometry as the positive examples. That makes the failure easy to isolate to a single structural contract breach rather than a confusing combination of unrelated errors across multiple nested surfaces.
